text:
Getting started
Get started with Amazon Bedrock
Get started with the Amazon Bedrock console and API.
Get started with Amazon Nova
Get started with the Amazon Nova console and API.
Documentation and SDKs
Amazon Bedrock User Guide
Describes how to use the Amazon Bedrock console and API.
API Reference
Describes the Amazon Bedrock API operations and parameters.
Code examples
Examples that show how to write code for your Amazon Bedrock application.
Inference and assessment
Inference
Use inference to generate responses from Amazon Bedrock models.
Cross-region inference
Route your inference requests across multiple AWS Regions during peak
              utilization bursts.
Inference profiles
Use a profile to route inference requests to a model and one or more
              AWS Regions.
Batch inference
Run model inferences asynchronously in batches.
Provisioned throughput
Dedicate capacity for your models.
Evaluation
Evaluate the performance of Amazon Bedrock resources.
Foundation models
Foundation model information
Find information about Amazon Bedrock models.
Foundation model marketplace
Find popular, emerging, and specialized foundation models.
Custom models
Customize a model with Fine-tuning, Distillation or Continued Pre-training.
Import models
Import foundation models that you have customized in other environments.
Prompt routing
Efficiently route requests between different
              foundational models within the same model family.
Builder tools
Agents
Build and configure autonomous agents in your application.
Flows
Connect Amazon Bedrock features and
              other AWS services to create generative AI workflows.
Knowledge bases
Improve model responses by using Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) with your data.
Prompt management
Create reusable prompts for your applications.
Guardrails
Implement application-specific safeguards based on your use cases and responsible AI policies.
Data automation
Data automation
Extract valuable insights from unstructured content.
Security
Security
Configure Amazon Bedrock to meet your security and compliance objectives.
Identity based policies
Grant users permission to perform actions on Amazon Bedrock with IAM policies.
AWS managed policies
Grant users permission to perform actions on Amazon Bedrock with IAM policies.
AWS service roles
Use IAM service roles for some features to let Amazon Bedrock carry out tasks on your behalf.
Resources
Amazon Bedrock in Amazon
              SageMaker Unified Studio
Learn how to use Amazon Bedrock in Amazon
              SageMaker Unified Studio.
Amazon Bedrock blogs
Read the Amazon Bedrock blogs.
Amazon Bedrock FAQs
Find answers to frequently asked questions.
Responsible AI
Transform responsible AI from theory into practice.
Amazon Bedrock re:Post Forum
Find crowd-sourced, expert-reviewed answers to your Amazon Bedrock questions.
Amazon Bedrock product page
Get more information about Amazon Bedrock.
